title: Drop and Copy are mutually exclusive
explanation: This error occurs when you try to implement or derive both Copy and Drop for the same type. These traits are fundamentally incompatible: Copy means bitwise duplication with no cleanup, while Drop means custom cleanup is needed when a value goes out of scope.
error_message: error[E0184]: the trait `Copy` cannot be implemented for this type; the type has a destructor
tip: If a type needs cleanup (Drop), it should use Clone for explicit duplication, not Copy. Copy types must be simple data with no owned resources.
